calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Margie James (Trustee).

Mr. Schultz explained circumstances to support termination of continuing Court supervision of the Trust. The Court granted the accounting petition as well as the request to terminate Court supervision of the Trust (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.
